flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Halifax Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Halifax Community College rose 45% between 2021 and 2024 (498 → 723).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Halifax Community College fell 45% between 2013 and 2016 ($6.2k → $3.4k).
